inputs.label: Energy in Kilocalories
inputs.businessContext: Amount of energy to convert from kilocalories

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount of energy to convert from kilocalories
businessContext_i18n.de: Energiemenge, die von Kilokalorien umgerechnet werden soll
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quantité d'énergie à convertir depuis les kilocalories
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad de energía a convertir desde kilocalorías

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output joules value

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output joules value
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı jul değeri için ondalık basamak sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl Dezimalstellen für den Ausgabewert in Joule
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour la valeur de sortie en joules
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para el valor de salida en julios

inputs.label: Joules per Kilocalorie
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor: 1 kilocalorie equals this many joules (standard 4184 J/kcal)

businessContext_i18n.en: Conversion factor: 1 kilocalorie equals this many joules (standard 4184 J/kcal)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüşüm faktörü: 1 kilokalori bu kadar joule eşittir (standart 4184 J/kcal)
businessContext_i18n.de: Umrechnungsfaktor: 1 Kilokalorie entspricht dieser Anzahl Joule (Standard 4184 J/kcal)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion : 1 kilocalorie équivaut à ce nombre de joules (standard 4184 J/kcal)
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión: 1 kilocaloría equivale a este número de julios (estándar 4184 J/kcal)

inputs.label: Scale Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplicative scale factor applied to the conversion result (default 1)

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplicative scale factor applied to the conversion result (default 1)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüşüm sonucuna uygulanan çarpımsal ölçek faktörü (varsayılan 1)
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikativer Skalierungsfaktor, der auf das Umrechnungsergebnis angewendet wird (Standard 1)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'échelle multiplicatif appliqué au résultat de conversion (par défaut 1)
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de escala multiplicativo aplicado al resultado de la conversión (predeterminado 1)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
